arts.ttl: Bayern Munich right-back Sacha Boey expresses his desire to play for the French national team
arts.sum: “That would of course be a great pleasure - and I work hard for that at the club,” Boey said (as captured by Twitter account @iMiaSanMia ). Sacha Boey put in a decent shift for Bayern Munich against Borussia Dortmund in his first game back after a long injury layover.

arts.ttl: FC Bayern Munich Asks Fans About Future Kit Details
arts.sum: To enhance fan engagement, FC Bayern Munich today launched a survey campaign today to gauge supporter preferences for future kit designs.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich eyeing Loris Karius to provide stopgap for goalkeeping position
arts.sum: Bayern are considering signing an experienced goalkeeper in January who could fill the number 2 role behind Daniel Peretz when Manuel Neuer and Sven Ulreich are out. There are two possibilities: Either to bring in a free agent like Loris Karius, or to sign a back-up from a Bundesliga or 2nd Bundesliga club in order to at least have a secure number 2 behind Peretz for the rest of the season.

arts.ttl: Mainz 05 vs. Bayern Munich: Lineups, team news, injuries, and more!
arts.sum: Can the Bavarians do one better and give a new meaning to oh-five by the end of this one? Bayern thrashed Mainz 4-0 just six weeks ago in the second round of the DFB-Pokal, a match which ended with Mainz players fuming at the referee .

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany addresses injury situation ahead of Mainz tilt
arts.sum: Looking at the injury history of a squad is important. We can Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany to the list of people impressed by the way that Mainz 05 has played this season.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich alumni Niklas Süle suffers nasty injury that will keep him out for months
arts.sum: After tearing his syndesmosis, an ankle ligament, back in October, Süle was forced to take a one month break before making his return in a clash against Bayern Munich in November. Borussia Dortmund ’s Niklas Süle has had horrid luck with injuries so far this season.

One thing is for sure: home security must be improved and valuable items hidden more…creatively, so as to curb the frequency of robberies. Bild and BFW can neither confirm nor deny if rice cookers or a truck full of chocolates were included in those “valuables”, nor can we say that a doppelganger is purportedly responsible for these crimes.

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel responds to England critics and reveals Harry Kane captaincy plans
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel, who will officially start as England boss on January 1, was handed a dream passport to the 2026 World Cup after being put in a qualifying Group with Serbia, Albania, Latvia and Andorra

arts.ttl: Weekend Warm-up: Bayern Munich’s Max Eberl still wants Jonathan Tah...should the club sign him for next season?; Bundesliga predictions; Throwing it back to Hot Hot Heat; and MORE!
arts.sum: According to Sport Bild journalist Christian Falk (in his work for CaughtOffside via @iMiaSanMia ), Bayern Munich board member for sport Max Eberl is still extremely interested in Bayer Leverkusen center-back Jonathan Tah, who has also been linked to FC Barcelona and Real Madrid : Bayern Munich will travel to Mainz 05 for a Bundesliga tilt where head coach Vincent Kompany will have to continue to work through the mini-injury crisis that is going on at the moment.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich and PSG battling for Brighton goalkeeper Bart Verbruggen
arts.sum: In October, we reported on it in our Transfer Update show and now it’s confirmed: Bart #Verbruggen from @OfficialBHAFC is a goalkeeper FC Bayern are monitoring closely in case the plan with Manuel Neuer and Alexander Nübel does not work out. Bayern Munich is reported to be actively looking for a replacement goalkeeper for Manuel Neuer with his current crop of deputies — Sven Ulreich, Alexander Nübel, and Daniel Peretz — perhaps all not on the level required at Bayern.
